SEARCH

Uses of Interface
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.IObserverFunction

Packages that use IObserverFunction
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.impl
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of JTerms.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt
This package contains classes for proof environments and proof management.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.infflow
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml
This package provides the functionalities of parsing JML comments into KeY constructs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.util
This package is a grab bag of miscellaneous useful code fragments.
de.uka.ilkd.key.wd
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.wd.po

  • Uses of IObserverFunction in de.uka.ilkd.key.java

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java that return IObserverFunction
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IObserverFunction
    JavaInfo.getInv()
    Returns the special symbol <inv> which stands for the class invariant of an object.
    IObserverFunction
    JavaInfo.getInvFree()
    Returns the special symbol <inv_free> which stands for the free class invariant of an object.
    IObserverFunction
    JavaInfo.getStaticInv(KeYJavaType target)
    Returns the special symbol <$inv> which stands for the static invariant of a type.
    IObserverFunction
    JavaInfo.getStaticInvFree(KeYJavaType target)
    Returns the special symbol <$inv_free&>, which stands for the static invariant of a type.

  • Uses of IObserverFunction in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

    Subinterfaces of IObserverFunction in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ProgramConstruct
    A type that implement this interface can be used in all java programs instead of an expression or statement.

    Description

    Modifier and Type

    Description

    IProgramMethod
     
    Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op that implement IObserverFunction
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ObserverFunction
    Objects of this class represent "observer" function or predicate symbols.
    final class 
    ProgramMethod
    The program method represents a (pure) method in the logic.
    final class 
    ProgramSV
    Objects of this class are schema variables matching program constructs within modal operators.

    abstract ImmutableSet<Pair<Sort,IObserverFunction>>
    ClassAxiom.getUsedObservers(Services services)

    ClassAxiom.getTaclets(ImmutableSet<Pair<Sort,IObserverFunction>> toLimit, Services services)
